response: Emily divides the 24 residents into 4 groups of 6, and since she allocates 3 initial prompts per group, that requires 12 prompts. She also has 10 extra prompts to share equally among the 4 groups, which means 2.5 extra prompts per group, but the total count of extra prompts remains 10. Adding the initial 12 to the extra 10 gives a total of 22 writing prompts needed for the session. This collection serves as a small library of creative ideas for the residents. A well-stocked library of prompts ensures every participant has fresh material to explore. The END.
